columns.description: America/New_York date derived from the exact Bronze response capture timestamp.
columns.name: source_capture_date

columns.description: Stable provisional lifecycle identifier inherited byte-for-byte from the reviewed lifecycle source.
columns.name: lifecycle_id

columns.description: Exact ticker used for the lifecycle-level request; no normalization or trim is applied in S6.
columns.name: query_ticker

columns.description: Exact historical date sent to the provider as the server-side Ticker Overview date parameter; equal to last_active_date.
columns.name: query_date

columns.description: First daily Assets snapshot date assigned to this provisional lifecycle.
columns.name: first_active_date

columns.description: Last daily Assets snapshot date assigned to this provisional lifecycle.
columns.name: last_active_date

columns.description: Provisional comparison key chosen in share_class_figi, composite_figi, cik, ticker priority order.
columns.name: identity_type

columns.description: Exact provisional identity value used to verify this Overview result.
columns.name: identity_value

columns.description: Always true in DATA; false source rows are retained only in high-severity quarantine.
columns.name: identity_match

columns.description: First comparable matching identity field establishing admission to DATA.
columns.name: identity_match_basis

columns.description: Provider results.ticker from the retrospective historical-date query, without normalization.
columns.name: ticker

columns.name: name

columns.description: Optional provider ticker type code returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: type

columns.description: Optional provider market code returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: market

columns.description: Optional provider locale code returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: locale

columns.description: Provider active flag returned for query_date; S7 must still reconcile historical membership.
columns.name: active

columns.description: Optional primary exchange MIC returned for query_date; S7 must reconcile it with dated Assets evidence.
columns.name: primary_exchange

columns.description: Optional provider currency name returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: currency_name

columns.description: Optional SEC CIK string returned for the retrospective query; leading zeros are preserved.
columns.name: cik

columns.description: Optional Composite FIGI returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: composite_figi

columns.description: Optional Share Class FIGI returned for the retrospective query.
columns.name: share_class_figi

columns.description: Optional SIC code returned for the retrospective query; it is not filing-time-safe industry evidence.
columns.name: sic_code

columns.description: Optional provider SIC description paired with the retrospective-query SIC evidence.
columns.name: sic_description

columns.description: Optional provider list date; S7 must reconcile it before use as a historical eligibility boundary.
columns.name: list_date

columns.description: Optional raw provider delisted timestamp retained without temporal reinterpretation.
columns.name: delisted_utc

columns.description: Optional provider ticker root.
columns.name: ticker_root

columns.description: Optional provider ticker suffix.
columns.name: ticker_suffix

columns.description: Fixed evidence_only_pending_s7 marker.
columns.name: identity_evidence_scope

columns.description: Always false in S6; only S7 may construct backtest identity intervals.
columns.name: backtest_identity_eligible

columns.description: Creation timestamp of the exact complete Bronze manifest.
columns.name: source_manifest_created_at_utc

columns.description: Completion/capture timestamp of the exact Ticker Overview response.
columns.name: source_capture_at_utc

columns.description: First XNYS session whose open is strictly after source_capture_at_utc.
columns.name: source_available_session

columns.description: XNYS open timestamp for source_available_session.
columns.name: source_available_at_utc

columns.description: Fixed first_xnys_open_after_source_capture_v1 rule.
columns.name: source_availability_rule

columns.description: Fixed retrospective_historical_query_without_archived_vintage_v1 marker.
columns.name: source_availability_quality

columns.description: Deterministic digest of the lifecycle and exact result lineage.
columns.name: source_record_id

columns.description: Canonical SHA-256 request identifier for the exact Ticker Overview response.
columns.name: source_request_id

columns.description: Provider-assigned request identifier from the successful response envelope.
columns.name: source_provider_request_id

columns.description: Relative path to the exact complete Bronze manifest.
columns.name: source_manifest_path

columns.description: SHA-256 of the exact complete Bronze manifest.
columns.name: source_manifest_sha256

columns.description: Relative path to the exact stored response artifact.
columns.name: source_artifact_path

columns.description: SHA-256 of the exact stored response artifact.
columns.name: source_artifact_sha256

columns.description: SHA-256 of the verified uncompressed response bytes.
columns.name: source_artifact_raw_sha256

columns.description: Manifest-bound page sequence; exactly zero for the one-page Overview endpoint.
columns.name: source_page_sequence

columns.description: Result ordinal within the one-object response; exactly zero.
columns.name: source_row_ordinal

columns.description: Canonical SHA-256 of the exact provider results object.
columns.name: source_result_hash

columns.description: Relative artifact path plus exact page and row locator.
columns.name: source_pointer

description: One allowlisted retrospective-date Ticker Overview observation for each verified provisional ticker lifecycle whose response has comparable matching identity evidence. The table is evidence for S7, not a point-in-time asset master.
grain: One verified lifecycle_id and exact manifest-bound Ticker Overview result; the 169 lifecycles without comparable matching identity evidence remain in high-severity quarantine and never enter DATA.

qa_rules.description: Output fields, order, Arrow types, and nullability must exactly match the S6 contract.
The immutable 30,739-row formal lifecycle request plan and its lineage must validate.
Every bound manifest and response artifact must pass byte-level integrity verification.
Every response must contain one successful manifest-bound Overview result object.
The reviewed source projection may not contain fields outside its exact allowlist.
The formal input must contain exactly 30,739 reviewed provisional lifecycle rows.
Required lifecycle, result, date, native-type, timestamp, and lineage fields must be valid.
DATA must contain no duplicate lifecycle_id.
Formal input must contain no duplicate query_ticker,query_date request key.
Formal input must contain no duplicate source_request_id.
Each lifecycle must satisfy first_active_date <= last_active_date = query_date.
A nonnull list_date may not be later than the lifecycle query_date.
No unresolved identity row may enter DATA.
Every DATA row must have a valid comparable matching identity basis.
market_cap and both share-count fields must remain Bronze-only and absent from S6 DATA.
Every DATA row must retain valid exact request, manifest, artifact, result-hash, and source-pointer lineage.
Capture date and operational availability must follow the frozen first-XNYS-open rule.
Every DATA row must retain evidence_only_pending_s7.
No S6 DATA row may be marked backtest identity eligible.
Input must equal DATA plus quarantine with no silent drops or synthetic rows.
The reviewed formal source must contain exactly 169 unresolved identity rows.
Only the reviewed identity_evidence_unresolved issue may enter S6 quarantine.
Rows without comparable matching identity evidence remain in high-severity quarantine; reviewed expectation is 169.
Source lifecycle rows without SIC evidence are measured; reviewed expectation is 14,057.
Source lifecycle rows without list_date evidence are measured; reviewed expectation is 7,322.
Every DATA row comes from a retrospective historical-date query captured later without an archived historical vintage and remains ineligible until S7.
